  "verses": [

      "n": 5,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "5. Un Jaderreja prett teem wt Kalpi tee Wihrf Schaipuff
Runnas-Kungus/ ka tee winna Uppes/ apfweizina tewi.
Padohmu tsuihzinatu wiffaLai-
kâ Korefa to Perseru Kehnixa/
ihds Dariuſa to Perseru Keh-
nixa Waldifchanu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "6. Un kad Aiswerus waldtja/
winna Waldifchanas Eefahku-
mâ/ rakſtija tee weenu Gaudas-
Grahmatu prett teem Eedsihwo-
ajeem no Juha un Jerusalemes.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "7. Un Artasastus Deenâs rak-
tija Biſlame/ Mitredats/ Ta-
peels un tee zitti no winnu Drau-
ses/ us Artasastu to Perseru
chnizu. Un tahs Grahmatas
Raksts bija Sihtreu Walldâ
akstihts/ un fhriſkt istahstihts.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "8. Rekums tas Kanzleris/ un
Simsajus tas Rakstitajs/raksti-
a Grahmatu prett Jerusalemi/
g to Kehnizu Artasastu / kas
a skana.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "9. Mehs Rekums Kanzleris/
n Simsajus Rakstitajs/ un tee
ittt no winnu Draudses. Tee
Dinâiterxi / un Awarsâiterxi /
Carplatterxi/ Perseri / Arakewi-
eri/ Babilonerxi / Susaniterxi /
Deawiterxi/ Gefamiterxi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "10. Un zittas Tautas/ fo tas
eels un flawejanis Asnawars irr
tweddig / un lizzis Samarijas
Pilstahtôs dsihwoht/ un tee zitti
chaipuffs Uppes / apfweizina
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "11. Un fchis irr tas Eekſchu-
Raksts/ fo tee us winnu / to
Kehnizu Artasastu fuhtiia: Ta-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "12. Lat tam Kehnixam fin-
nams irr/ ka tee Judi / kas no
tewim irr augſcham gabjutcht
pee mums irr uhs Jerusalemi
nahkufchi/ un uszelf to dumpi-
gu un niknu Pilsfahtu / ta pa-
scha Muhris ustaisa tee/ un ja-
leek to Grunti.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "13. Tad nu lat finnams irr
tam Kehnixam/ ja fchis Pils-
fahts taps uszelfs/ un tee Muh-
ri pataisiti / tad tee ne nodohs
tobs Mejlus/ wezzu Teefu/ neds
Muitu/un ta atraufi tu to An-
gumu no ta Kehniza Mantas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "14. Kad nu wiſſi no ta Keh-
nixa Pils Usturreſchanu dabbu/
tad mums ne peeſlabjahs ta Keh-
nixa Skahdu ta usluhkoht. Ta-
pehz effain mehs fuhtijscht / un
tam Kehnixam no ta Sinnu
dewutchi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "15. Ka ineflehts tohp eekſch
tawo Tehwo Laiku-Grahmatas/
tad atraffi tu tai Laiku-Grah-
matâ/ un atſihſt scho Pilsfahtu
effain weenu dumpigu / un teem
Kehnixeem un Walstahin wainu-
Darrigu Pilsfahtu bijufchu / un
ka tee jaw feunn Laiku ta irr dsih-
woitschi/ ka tee atkahpuschi / ta-
pehz irr fchis Pilsfahts ispoh-
stihts.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "16. Mehs dohdam tam Keh-
nixam Sinnu/ ka/ ja tchis Pils-
fahts taps uszelfs/ un winna
Muhr taps patatsiti/ tu preeftch
Vn v v v winna
"
    }
  ],
